name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.LeftHandParentEffector
summary: 1 = Use leftShoulder. Effector from which the left hand pointing originates. Ie, point from this part to the target. -1 causes default offset for active weapon mode to be applied.
remarks:
Default value = -1.
            Min value = -1.
            Max value = 21.
